Therefore Jupiter is the native, Sun is native's father and
hence JUPITER+SUN - indicates native's father was a
respectable person.

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 27
According to degrees Venus is after the Sun degree. The
clockwise planet Venus, after passing 7 degrees enters the East
sign of Sagittarius. But Aries is also in East, where there is Dragon
Head. Leo is also in the East, where there is Moon. Here (in
Aries) Venus meets first the moon who is in I 0 Degres and later
meets Dragon Head.
Or in other words Venus meets Moon lst, who is in lO
Degree in the East sign and later meets Dragon Head who is also
in the East but in 22 Degrees. Therefore Venus has to overcome
much difficulties, indicating late marriage. Or even after marriage
during the lstpart, the native undergoes crisis.
MARSONIC EFFECTS (ANGARAKA DOSHA) (LATE
MARRIAGE)
In the last chart Mars is in Virgo which is South and behind
East where there is Moon.
